strengths: Strong TypeScript and Node.js proficiency with production use across multiple recent roles (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, re:cinq)
Demonstrated clean-code and TDD discipline, including teaching and organizing code kata and refactoring sessions
Relevant nice-to-have coverage: AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployment, and active LLM/AI-agent infrastructure work
concerns: Severely overqualified: 15+ years of experience across staff and senior roles makes this a junior/mid-level mismatch likely to cause retention problems
Location conflict: candidate is based in Lagos, Nigeria, while the role explicitly requires high on-site presence (implied European office)
No direct PostgreSQL or NestJS experience mentioned; primary DB exposure is MongoDB and MySQL, and React usage is limited to one role
response.justification: The candidate has a genuinely strong technical profile — deep TypeScript, solid TDD culture, AWS experience, and current AI-agent work — that maps well to the stack described in the job. However, the role is explicitly junior/mid-level and the candidate is a Staff-level engineer with over 15 years of professional history; this creates a fundamental fit problem around expectations, compensation, and retention. Compounding this, the candidate is currently located in Lagos, Nigeria, which is incompatible with the high on-site presence requirement unless relocation is already planned and confirmed.
